subcodes.first_line: O Manifestation of Bounty! The bestowals of the Lord God are of two kinds: manifest and hidden. As for those that are manifest, all that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مظهر بخشش بخشش حضرت ایزد بر دو قسم است آشکار و پنهانی اما آشکار جمیع آنچه
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @divine emanation is ceaseless; eternal
